hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then cd /Users/rserebrianskyi/IdeaProjects/ai-workshops/homework-6-kotlin && ./gradlew test jacocoTestCoverageVerification 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"JaCoCo coverage gate failed — push blocked. Run ./gradlew test jacocoTestReport to see the report."}'; exit 2; fi; fi
